queries.question: Can you show me which tablet and laptop models run on Windows 10?
queries.sql:
SELECT Tablets.model
FROM Operating_System JOIN Tablets ON Operating_System.OS_ID = Tablets.OS_ID
WHERE Operating_System.Name = "Windows 10"
UNION
SELECT Laptops.model
FROM Operating_System JOIN Laptops ON Operating_System.OS_ID = Laptops.OS_ID
WHERE Operating_System.Name = "Windows 10"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?operating_system a :Operating_System .
    ?tablets a :Tablets .
    ?tablets p:hasOperating_System ?operating_system .
    ?tablets p:Model ?model .
    ?operating_system p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Windows 10")
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?operating_system a :Operating_System .
    ?laptops a :Laptops .
    ?laptops p:hasOperating_System ?operating_system .
    ?laptops p:Model ?model .
    ?operating_system p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Windows 10")
    BIND(?model AS ?o0)
  }
}
